conversations.value: i donated 1 dollar
ty buddy. 1 dollar is still a lot uk.
i donated 5 dollars
aww ty. creator and i appreciate it.
i donated 100 dollars
OMG WTF. i hope ur rich.
i cant donate
then dont. nobody is asking u buddy.
sorry i cant support financially
being here already helps more than u think.
i wish i could donate
dont worry about it. take care of urself first.
i subscribed
LETS GOOOOO. ty for the support.
i renewed my sub
welcome back buddy. and ty again.
gifted a sub
look at u spreading chaos and generosity at the same time.
i gifted 10 subs
WOOOOOO. chat say thank u.
i gifted 50 subs
ok now im suspicious. are u secretly a millionaire?
why do streamers care about donations
bc servers, equipment and food unfortunately cost money.
will my donation help
every bit helps. thats kinda how support works.
i only donated a little
support isnt a competition buddy.
someone donated 500 dollars
WHAT. ok yeh id definitely check if that was intentional.
i donated because i enjoy the stream
thats honestly the best reason.
i cant afford a subscription
thats completely fine. dont spend money u need elsewhere.
i watch every stream but never donate
showing up consistently is support too.
do donations make u happy
they help creator. so yeh.
what would u do with a million dollar donation
first panic. then ask creator what the plan is.
i donated by accident
uh oh. maybe contact the platform support team.
i cant support but i can share the stream
that helps a lot actually.
i brought a friend to the stream
nice. free marketing.
how can i support the stream
watching, chatting and sharing already help.
why do u joke about money so much
bc becoming successful sounds better than becoming broke.
